deviations.description: The process model enforces that both physical examination and blood test are always performed before making a diagnosis, as shown in the process flow on page 1. Version 2 permits making a diagnosis even if these activities have not been performed. The process unnecessarily restricts behavior by not allowing diagnosis without these prerequisites.
The process model requires a physical examination before diagnosis, but Version 2 allows diagnosis without a physical examination. The process continues to enforce an outdated constraint.
The process model requires a blood test before diagnosis, but Version 2 allows diagnosis without a blood test. The process continues to enforce an outdated constraint.
process_model_reference: Draw Blood Samples, Blood Analysis Requested, Blood Analysis Results
